arts.sum: RKC Waalwijk will travel to De Grolsch Veste on Sunday to face Twente, with both teams heading in different directions. Waalwijk is currently unbeaten in four consecutive matches, while Twente is look...

arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Sunday's Eredivisie clash between FC Twente and RKC Waalwijk, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
